name: Crackling Fish Fillets (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup fresh parsley leaves, rinsed and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush a nonstick skillet with olive oil.
2. Dip each fish piece in flour and shake off excess.
3. Heat the skillet until hot.
4. Add the fish to the skillet and sauté without moving for 1-2 minutes, or until it just sets and turns golden.
5. Flip the fish using a spatula and cook on the other side for another 2 minutes, or until firm and cooked through.
6. Remove the fish from the skillet and place on serving plates.
7. In the same skillet, add water, lemon juice, and zest. Increase heat to medium-high.
8. Scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan and boil for about 2 minutes.
9. Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in butter and parsley.
10. Season with salt and pepper, then spoon over the fish.
11. Serve with steamed sugar snap peas or other vegetables. French bread on the side is optional.
